package rulecoverage

func PositiveSharedSliceAppendRace() string {
    ruleID := "shared_slice_append_race"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "goroutines appending to a shared slice without synchronization"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
